title: MyndLift - For Focus during Brain Fog
description: MyndLift is a plant-based supplement with natural herbs like Tulsi, Bacopa, and Ginkgo. Supports mental clarity and focus. Helps reduce forgetfulness.

title: Menopause Wellness Kit
description: Multivitamin Women 40+, Calcium+D3+K2, and Marine Magnesium for menopause care. All the nutrients are nature-based. No synthetics or harmful chemicals. Helps with hormonal balance, easing hot flashes, knee pain, mood swings, & more.

title: Multivitamin Women 40+ & Marine Magnesium Powder

Made with nutrients like Vitamin C from Amla, Magnesium from Irish sea waters, as well as containing traditional herbs like shatavari & gokshura. No added synthetics or additives.

title: MonkSweet - Sweetness from Monk Fruit
description: - Natural replacement to refined sugar - Made from Monk Fruit  a plant-based, zero-calorie sweetener that does not spike blood sugar and Gut-Friendly Guar Fiber - Supports blood sugar balance & gut health - No erythritol or polyols that can cause bloating or gut sensitivity. (Unlike most sweeteners, MonkSweet is erythritol-free) - 1 scoop (0.6 g) provides sweetness equivalent to approximately 34 g of regular sugar. - Expertly formulated by doctors, nutritionists - FSSAI & GMP approved

title: Inner Glow Blend
description: Earthful Plant-Based Inner Glow Blend Supplement is a vegan formula designed to boost collagen for youthful, radiant skin while hydrating and nourishing. Enriched with Biotin, Omega-3, and antioxidants like Vitamin C and Resveratrol, it ensures easy absorption for visible results without bloating. Collagen Building : Promotes collagen building with plant-based ingredients like Pea Protein, Vitamin C, and Silica for healthy, glowing skin. Youthful & Radiant Skin : Promotes a glowing, youthful skin by boosting collagen with plant-based ingredients like Amla and Vitamin C. Natural Ingredients : Formulated with plant-based ingredients, including Omega-3 from Flaxseeds and Resveratrol from Japanese knotweed. Our Clean Promise: No Additives, No Synthetics, No Chemicals, No Fillers, No GMO. No Artificial Flavours.

title: Root Nourish Capsules
description: A clean, plant-based formula to support stronger, healthier hair. With natural herbs, biotin, Vitamin A and antioxidant-packed grape seeds. It also contains DHT blockers like pumpkin seed and nettle leaf to help strengthen roots and improve hair quality. No harmful chemicals or synthetics.
